name: Wreath of the Prism (Dormant)
description:
This loop of golden thorns is inset with dozens of gems representing the five colors of Tiamat.
{"type": "entries", "name": "Dormant", "entries": ["While wearing the wreath in its dormant state, you have {@sense darkvision} out to a range of 60 feet.
